mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_memory_candidate ( user_id, session_id, memory_type, content, evidence, importance, evidence_message_id, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid), #{memoryType}, #{content}, #{evidence}, #{importance},
CAST(#{evidenceMessageId} AS uuid) null , #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, session_id, memory_type, content, evidence, importance, evidence_message_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user_memory_candidate WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id, session_id, memory_type, content, evidence, importance, evidence_message_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user_memory_candidate WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid) AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, user_id, session_id, memory_type, content, evidence, importance, evidence_message_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user_memory_candidate WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND content = #{content} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE user_memory_candidate SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_memory_candidate WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
